title: Italian Dumpling Pudding
description: A creamy, sweet, and comforting dessert inspired by Italian cuisine. This pudding features gooey dumplings in a rich milk-based sauce.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine milk, almonds, and bitter.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.
Cook for 10 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Add the dumplings to the saucepan and cook for another 5 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to individual serving cups or a large baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with additional almonds if desired.
